description: 107 custom skills for Claude Code CLI — slash commands for common workflows.

description: Clean-room Fidelity fund analyzer — local-only, no remote.

description: Fidelity mutual fund analysis — performance comparison, expense ratio optimization, portfolio allocation. Feeds data into ICC.

description: Jacksonville ICW fishing intelligence — 8 parallel APIs (NOAA tides/wind/temp/pressure, solunar, sunrise-sunset, NWS), 9 spot rankings, 10 species scoring, full bait/rig system, 100-pt Go/No-Go.

name: fishing-analyzer
description: Local fishing analysis tool — companion to Fishing-Report-Analyzer with enhanced local data processing.

name: fixer-github
description: GitHub repository fixer tool — automated cleanup and maintenance for GitHub repos. Local-only.

name: gws-cli-explore
description: GWS CLI exploration tool — forked from Google Workspace CLI.

name: march-madness
description: March Madness bracket analysis — historical trend modeling and upset prediction for NCAA tournament.

description: NCAAB Sweet 16 deep-dive analysis — advanced matchup modeling for tournament rounds.

name: nvda-explore
description: NVIDIA stock analysis — technical indicators, earnings impact modeling, and price action research.

name: seang1121
description: GitHub profile README — personal developer profile and portfolio showcase.
